creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214796
graphics/ufraw poudriere build log with failure to compile

The port graphics/ufraw fails to build for me using poudriere on 12.1 Stable amd64 with error:

dcraw_indi.c:167:33: error: variable 'noise' must have explicitly specified data sharing attributes
            thold = threshold * noise[lev];

Below is an excerpt of the build log that I have also attached:


mv -f .deps/iccjpeg.Tpo .deps/iccjpeg.Po
